title: [CI:DOCS] Cirrus: Update podman-machine comment

comments.body: @edsantiago this is not urgent.  When you get a minute, could you double-check I've got the `_bail_if_test_can_be_skipped docs test/apiv2` line correct here (see the commit/PR message too).

Oops. Actually, this can never work. `bail_if_etc` only knows about tests under the `test` subdirectory. If podman-machine tests were under `test/machine`, then it would work. They live under `pkg`, so, there's no way to make this work.

> Oops. Actually, this can never work. bail_if_etc only knows about tests under the test subdirectory.

Oof, ya I looked closer at the function to see how hard it would be, but you're right :cry: 

Okay, I'll remove the whole comment that mentions `bail_if...` to hopefully help somebody else avoid messing with it.
Force-pushed: Reduced PR to just a `TODO` comment update & removed dependency on #15031
